Frequently asked questions

How many lawyers are in Cobb County, GA?

458 lawyers and law firms across 9 cities in Cobb County are listed here, 315 firms and 143 solo attorneys.

Which cities in Cobb County have lawyers listed?

Marietta (348), Kennesaw (55), Smyrna (18), Acworth (11), Austell (9), Powder Springs (8), Mableton (7), Fair Oaks (1), and more.

Who is a top rated lawyer in Cobb County?

Jones & Swanson in Marietta is among the highest rated, with 5.0 stars across 569 reviews.
